_comment: MCP-compatible tool definitions for AgentOS Graph API. Set AGENT_OS_API_TOKEN and send Authorization: Bearer ${AGENT_OS_API_TOKEN} on every request.

tools.name: graph_context
tools.description: Get dependency graph context for a project. Returns top modules with coupling metrics, import/export relationships, and cycle warnings.
tools.usage: Use BEFORE modifying files to understand what depends on what.

tools.name: graph_dependents
tools.description: Find all files that depend on (import from) a specific file.
tools.usage: Use AFTER changing exported types/functions to find all files that need updating.

tools.name: graph_impact
tools.description: Transitive impact analysis — what breaks if you change this file? Up to 3 hops.
tools.usage: Use to assess blast radius before making breaking changes.

tools.name: graph_verify
tools.description: Verify project architecture: check for circular dependencies and instability.
tools.usage: Run AFTER completing changes to ensure no new cycles introduced.

tools.name: graph_overview
tools.description: Get all projects with segment grouping and shared resource edges.

tools.name: graph_project
tools.description: Get file-level dependency graph for a specific project.
